subcodes.first_line: O thou observer of the Kingdom of Signs! The time hath come for thee to behold, in the reality of thine essence, all the inner signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ایات وقت آنست که کل ایات انفسیه را در حقیقت کینونت مشاهده
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being
